hooks.command: .codex/scripts/edited-files-from-hook.sh | while IFS= read -r f; do case "$f" in *.json) [ -f "$f" ] || continue; out=$(python3 -m json.tool "$f" 2>&1 >/dev/null) || { printf 'JSON 校验失败：%s\n%s\n' "$f" "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac; done

.codex/scripts/edited-files-from-hook.sh | while IFS= read -r f; do case "$f" in *.sh) [ -f "$f" ] || continue; out=$(shellcheck "$f" 2>&1) || { printf 'shellcheck 告警：%s\n%s\n' "$f" "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac; done
